summary: Bug fix verification - CategoryPage Select component crash fix verified. All 5 category pages load without crashing, filter dropdowns (Sub Category, Type) work correctly with the 'all' value fix.

issues: Some property card images take time to load (shows gray placeholder) - minor UX issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, trending properties
All 5 category cards present (home, business, stay, event, services)
/category/home - Page loads without crash (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
/category/home - Sub Category dropdown opens and works (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
/category/home - Type dropdown opens and works (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
/category/business - Page loads, dropdowns work, shows 3 listings
/category/stay - Page loads, dropdowns work, shows 4 listings
/category/event - Page loads, dropdowns work, shows 3 listings
/category/services - Page loads, dropdowns work, shows 4 listings
Header navigation to all categories (Home, Business, Stay, Event, Services)
Reels page loads with 5 reel items
Reels page action buttons (Like, Save, Share) present
Radix Select component with value='all' fix works correctly
Filter selection triggers API call and updates listings
critical_code_review_comments: Select component fix is correct - using 'all' as value instead of empty string and converting back to '' for API filtering
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with sample listings for all 5 categories (Home: 3, Business: 3, Stay: 4, Event: 3, Services: 4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CategoryPage.js Select component crash fix verified. The fix changes value='' to value='all' and converts 'all' back to empty string in onValueChange handler for API filtering. All 5 category pages (/category/home, /category/business, /category/stay, /category/event, /category/services) work without crashing. Reels page works with sample data.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: CategoryPage crashed due to Radix Select component not accepting empty string value
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed value='' to value='all' and updated onValueChange handlers to convert 'all' back to empty string for API filtering
bug_fix_verification.test_results: All category pages load without crash, filter dropdowns work correctly
